reasoning_chain_text: 1. Determine the locations described for Kirat Chuli and Kangpenqing.
2. Return the description identifying the mountain located in China.
original_final_question: Which description identifies the mountain located in China, Kirat Chuli or Kangpenqing? Write your answer as [ANSWER].
original_reasoning_chain: Node 1 and Node 2: Kirat Chuli lies on the border between Nepal and India, while Kangpenqing is in Tibet, China, so the description identifying the mountain located in China is the Kangpenqing description. -> Kangpenqing (also Gang Benchhen) is a mountain in the Baiku Himalayas of Tibet, China.
Final answer: Kangpenqing (also Gang Benchhen) is a mountain in the Baiku Himalayas of Tibet, China.
